name: 提取電視台名稱和生成分析報告統計表測試
on:
  schedule:
    - cron: '55 */1 * * *'
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  extract:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    steps:
      - name: Checkout current repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Download XML files
        run: |
          curl -L --retry 3 --max-time 10 -o twepg.xml https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zzq12345/epgtest/main/twepg.xml
          curl -L --retry 3 --max-time 10 -o swepg.xml https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zzq12345/epgtest/main/swepg.xml
          [ -s twepg.xml ] || { echo "twepg.xml 为空"; exit 1; }
          [ -s swepg.xml ] || { echo "swepg.xml 为空"; exit 1; }

      - name: Extract channel names, analyze, and update README
        run: |
          python <<'EOF'
          import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
          import json
          from datetime import datetime
          import re
          import os

          def analyze_epg_data(xml_file):
              try:
                tree = ET.parse(xml_file)
                root = tree.getroot()
                ns = {}
                if root.tag.startswith('{'):
                    ns_uri = root.tag.split('}')[0][1:]
                    ns = {'ns': ns_uri}
                  
                channels_info = {}
                channel_xpath = 'ns:channel' if ns else 'channel'
                original_order_ids = []
                
                for channel in root.findall(channel_xpath, ns):
                    channel_id = channel.get('id')
                    if not channel_id: continue
                    if channel_id not in channels_info:
                        original_order_ids.append(channel_id)
                
                    name = channel.get('display-name')
                    if not name:
                        name_elem = channel.find('ns:display-name' if ns else 'display-name', ns)
                        name = name_elem.text.strip() if name_elem is not None and name_elem.text else None
                      
                    name = name.strip() if name else channel_id
                    channels_info[channel_id] = {
                        'name': name,
                        'program_count': 0,
                        'start_times': [],
                        'end_times': []
                    }

                programme_xpath = 'ns:programme' if ns else 'programme'
                for programme in root.findall(programme_xpath, ns):
                    channel_id = programme.get('channel')
                    if channel_id not in channels_info: continue
                          
                    channels_info[channel_id]['program_count'] += 1
                    start = programme.get('start')
                    stop = programme.get('stop')
                    
                    # 使用正則提取前 14 位數字，無視時區偏移
                    if start:
                        s_match = re.search(r'\d{14}', start)
                        if s_match: channels_info[channel_id]['start_times'].append(s_match.group())
                    if stop:
                        e_match = re.search(r'\d{14}', stop)
                        if e_match: channels_info[channel_id]['end_times'].append(e_match.group())

                result = []
                for channel_id, info in channels_info.items():
                    time_range = "無數據"
                    duration_days = 0
                    epg_status = "□"
                      
                    if info['start_times'] and info['end_times']:
                        try:
                            sorted_starts = sorted(info['start_times'])
                            sorted_ends = sorted(info['end_times'])
                            
                            start_dt = datetime.strptime(sorted_starts[0], '%Y%m%d%H%M%S')
                            end_dt = datetime.strptime(sorted_ends[-1], '%Y%m%d%H%M%S')
                              
                            delta = end_dt - start_dt
                            # 計算天數：天數 + (剩餘秒數是否超過1小時)
                            duration_days = delta.days + (1 if delta.seconds > 3600 else 0)
                            time_range = f"{start_dt.strftime('%m-%d %H:%M')} ~ {end_dt.strftime('%m-%d %H:%M')}"
                        except Exception as e:
                            time_range = "格式異常"

                    if info['program_count'] > 0: epg_status = "■"

                    result.append({
                        'channel_id': channel_id,
                        'channel_name': info['name'],
                        'program_count': info['program_count'],
                        'duration_days': duration_days,
                        'time_range': time_range,
                        'epg_status': epg_status
                    })
                  
                order_map = {id: index for index, id in enumerate(original_order_ids)}
                result.sort(key=lambda x: order_map.get(x['channel_id'], 999))

                return result
              except Exception as e:
                  print(f"❌ 解析 {xml_file} 出错: {e}")
                  return []

          print("正在分析 EPG 數據...")
          tw_data = analyze_epg_data('twepg.xml')
          sw_data = analyze_epg_data('swepg.xml')

          def generate_files(data, prefix):
              table_data = {
                  'title': f'{prefix}列表',
                  'headers': ['频道ID', '频道名称', '节目数量', '天数', '时间范围', '状态'],
                  'data': [[c['channel_id'], c['channel_name'], c['program_count'], c['duration_days'], c['time_range'], c['epg_status']] for c in data]
              }
              with open(f'{prefix}_channels_table.json', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                  json.dump(table_data, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)

          generate_files(tw_data, 'traditional')
          generate_files(sw_data, 'simplified')

          def generate_readme():
              readme1_content = ""
              try:
                  if os.path.exists('README1.md'):
                      with open('README1.md', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                          readme1_content = f.read()
              except Exception as e:
                  print(f"❌ 讀取 README1.md 出錯: {e}")

              current_time = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
              analysis_content = f"# 📺 EPG 電子節目表狀態報告\n\n"
              analysis_content += f"> 最後更新時間: **{current_time}**\n\n"
              analysis_content += "## 📊 統計摘要\n"
              analysis_content += f"- **繁體頻道數**: {len(tw_data)} (節目總數: {sum(x['program_count'] for x in tw_data)})\n"
              analysis_content += f"- **簡體頻道數**: {len(sw_data)} (節目總數: {sum(x['program_count'] for x in sw_data)})\n\n"

              for title, data in [("🇹🇼 繁體頻道列表", tw_data), ("🇨🇳 簡體頻道列表", sw_data)]:
                  analysis_content += f"## {title}\n\n"
                  analysis_content += "| 頻道名稱 | 節目數量 | 覆蓋天數 | 時間範圍 | 狀態 |\n"
                  analysis_content += "| :--- | :---: | :---: | :--- | :---: |\n"
                  for item in data:
                      status_icon = "✅" if item['epg_status'] == "■" else "⚠️"
                      count_display = item['program_count'] if item['program_count'] > 0 else "**0**"
                      row = f"| {item['channel_name']} | {count_display} | {item['duration_days']} 天 | {item['time_range']} | {status_icon} |\n"
                      analysis_content += row
                  analysis_content += "\n"
              
              with open('README.md', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                  f.write(readme1_content + "\n\n" + analysis_content)
              print("✅ README.md 已更新")

          generate_readme()
          EOF

      - name: Extract channel names (保持顺序)
        run: |
          python <<'EOF'
          import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
          def extract(xml, out):
            try:
                  tree = ET.parse(xml)
                  root = tree.getroot()
                  ns = {'ns': root.tag.split('}')[0][1:]} if root.tag.startswith('{') else {}
                  seen = set()
                  lines = []
                  path = 'ns:channel' if ns else 'channel'
                  for c in root.findall(path, ns):
                      n = c.get('display-name')
                      if not n:
                          ne = c.find('ns:display-name' if ns else 'display-name', ns)
                          n = ne.text.strip() if ne and ne.text else c.get('id')
                      if n and n not in seen:
                          seen.add(n);
                          lines.append(n)
                  with open(out, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write('\n'.join(lines))
            except: pass
          extract('twepg.xml', '繁體電視台目錄.txt')
          extract('swepg.xml', '简体电视台目录.txt')
          EOF

      - name: Commit and push results
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add "繁體電視台目錄.txt" "简体电视台目录.txt" "*.json" "README.md"
          if git diff --cached --quiet; then
            echo "⚠️ 没有需要提交的变更"
          else
            git commit -m "Update EPG analysis and README (auto-generated)"
            for i in {1..3}; do
              git pull --rebase && git push && exit 0 || sleep 5
            done
            exit 1
          fi
